title: CodeModificationPlan
description: Structural mapping from test-strategy.md test cases to the SUT's existing code. Produced by Step 7 (test-architect) and consumed by Step 8 (TDD codegen). Authoritative for placement decisions (which fixtures to reuse, where new POM methods go, what TBD intents to emit). The writer agent transpiles the plan into code; it does not redo placement reasoning.

test_file_target.description: SUT-relative or absolute path where the qtea-prefixed test file lands. Must match the active module's test_directory_layout convention.

steps.description: Ordered method-call choreography for this test function. Includes BOTH the Arrange steps that satisfy the strategy's Preconditions (phase='arrange': authentication such as logIn, entity creation, navigation to the entity under test) AND one entry per manual test-case action step (phase='act'). The Step 8 writer transpiles these in order into sequential POM method calls instead of re-deriving the sequence from the strategy prose — so if the login/setup is not represented here, the generated test will have no login/setup. Optional (fallback to strategy prose when absent), but strongly preferred for any multi-step flow.

order.description: 1-based execution order within the test function.

manual_step_ref.description: Short reference to the originating manual step in test-strategy.md (e.g. 'step 2: click sign-in').

pom.description: POM class that owns the method — must match a page_objects[].name in the same test case.

method.description: Method to call on the POM — must be a reused method or a missing_methods[].name on the referenced pom.

phase.description: Which phase of the test this step belongs to. 'arrange' = precondition setup the strategy's Preconditions require (authentication / entity creation / navigation to the entity under test); 'act' = the manual-step actions; 'assert' = verification. Default 'act' when omitted. The architect MUST translate the strategy's Preconditions into explicit ordered 'arrange' steps (e.g. logIn, createBasicRopaEntry) — the writer will not invent them.

args.description: AUTHORITATIVE ordered argument expressions the writer emits verbatim for this call — one per required parameter (plus any optional ones being set), in signature order. Each item is a code expression: a constant name the plan expects the writer to declare (e.g. 'USERNAME_ISP_OFFICE'), a quoted string literal (e.g. "'Approved'"), or a variable captured by an earlier step (e.g. 'entityName'). Populate this whenever the called method takes arguments — leaving it empty for a method that needs arguments is the defect that produces zero-arg stub calls. Use args_hint only for genuinely non-committal hints.

args_hint.description: Optional non-authoritative hints for the argument values (e.g. ['valid email', 'EXPECTED_URL']). Prefer the authoritative `args` field; the writer sources exact values from `args` first, then test-strategy.md.

locator.description: Optional locator constant name this step interacts with — must reference a planned locators[].name in the same test case.

from.description: Required when source=reuse. File:symbol pointer from sut_inventory (e.g. tests/conftest.py:auth_session).

at.description: Required when source=create. SUT-relative file path where the new fixture lands.

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming the matching dimension that justifies reusing this fixture (e.g. 'yields Page already authenticated as admin').

from.description: Required when source=reuse. SUT-relative file path of the existing POM class.

at.description: Required when source=create. SUT-relative file path where the new POM lands.

missing_methods.description: Methods that the test cases need but don't exist on the (reused or created) POM. The codegen step adds these to the POM file with the given signatures.

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming the matching dimension (e.g. 'ChatPage already models the side-nav route this TC exercises').
Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming why this helper fits (matching signature, side-effect-free, etc).

name.description: The locator constant name (e.g. LOGIN_BUTTON). Used as the symbol the writer agent imports or declares.

owning_page.description: Name of the POM class that owns this locator (cross-references page_objects[].name).

from.description: Required when source=reuse. SUT-relative file path of the existing locator constant.

intent.description: Required when source=create_tbd. Semantic intent string used by the JIT resolver at runtime. Prefer visible role+label (e.g. 'sign in button').

reuse_justification.description: Required by the s07 phase gate when source=reuse. One sentence naming why this locator constant fits (matching selector intent, owning-page coherence).
